what_it_does: Records metadata that attaches a channel-memory artifact to a board item in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
conventions: References a board item via a board:// URI
notes: A bare attachment metadata stub that links att-9dd85a31 to board item item-c9a1bc40 in dragnet-development.
questions: What content or object does board://item-c9a1bc40 represent?
What does attachment_type board_items imply about the relationship?
Why was this attachment created and by whom?
intention_signals: Capture and preserve a typed, timestamped relationship between a channel attachment and a specific board item.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed reference that connects an attachment identifier to a board item URI within a channel memory ledger.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML metadata stub for attachment att-9dd85a31 that records a board_items link to board://item-c9a1bc40 in the dragnet-development channel.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a channel attachment's association with a board item for later retrieval and traceability.
